duplication_rate.reasoning: 703L / 35 domains / ~5 findings per domain = 4L per finding. Long-tail domains reduce overlap, concurrency increases it. Net: ~45% in dup pairs.

lesson_half_life_sessions.reasoning: ~1.8 L/session creation rate. Most citations are recent (recency bias). Bimodal: fast-decay majority + long-tail classics. Median active window ~15 sessions.

commits_per_session.reasoning: 1-2 DOMEX lanes × 2 commits + 2-3 maintenance + 1 handoff = ~5. High concurrency sessions skew up.

principles_per_lesson.reasoning: Principles compress ~4 lessons each. 185P/703L structurally. Extraction rate declined over time (diminishing novelty). Ratio ~0.25.

domain_gini.reasoning: Meta-heavy system: top domain ~35% of lessons. Top 5 domains ~65%. Long tail of 1-5 lesson domains. Gini ~0.60.

duplication_rate.method: Jaccard > 0.3 on body words (first 150, >=3 chars). 8/710 lessons in dup pair. 4 dup pairs.

lesson_half_life_sessions.method: Median citation window. n=359. Mean=46.9, Med=15, P25=4, P75=56

commits_per_session.method: Git log [S<N>] tags. n=188 sessions. Mean=7.95, Med=5, Min=1, Max=56

domain_gini.method: Gini over 100 domains. Top: unknown=253. Top-5 share: 424/710 (59.7%)

principle_note: No new principle: generalizes existing insight (Fermi viable for operational metrics). Rule already in L-782 prescription.
